mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO /*+append_values */ SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE ( ID , I18N_KEY , I18N_VALUE , LANGU_CODE , MODULE_CODE , MODULE_VERSION_CODE , VALID , CREATOR , MODIFIER , CREATE_TIME , MODIFY_TIME )
(SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.i18nKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.i18nValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.languCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.moduleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.moduleVersionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} FROM DUAL )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(I18N_KEY) FROM( SELECT I18N_KEY , MAX(MODIFY_TIME) from (SELECT I18N_KEY,MODIFY_TIME FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE VALID = '1'
AND I18N_KEY LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_key},'%'))
AND LANGU_CODE = #{langu_code} AND I18N_VALUE LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_value},'%'))
) GROUP BY I18N_KEY)

SELECT COUNT(I18N_KEY) FROM( select I18N_KEY , MAX(MODIFY_TIME) from (SELECT I18N_KEY,MODIFY_TIME FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE VALID = '1'
AND I18N_KEY LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_key},'%'))
AND I18N_VALUE LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_value},'%')) ) GROUP BY I18N_KEY)

SELECT ID , I18N_KEY , I18N_VALUE , LANGU_CODE , MODULE_CODE , MODULE_VERSION_CODE , VALID , CREATOR , MODIFIER , CREATE_TIME , MODIFY_TIME FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE .VALID = '1' AND I18N_KEY IN
#{i18n_key}

SELECT ID , I18N_KEY , I18N_VALUE , LANGU_CODE , MODULE_CODE , MODULE_VERSION_CODE , VALID FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE 1=1
AND MODULE_CODE = #{moduleCode} AND LANGU_CODE = #{languCode} AND VALID = '1'

SELECT COUNT( I18N_KEY ) FROM ( SELECT I18N_KEY FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE.VALID = '1' AND
I18N_KEY LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_key},'%')) ESCAPE '\'
GROUP BY SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE.I18N_KEY ) T2

SELECT I18N_KEY FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE VALID = '1'
AND I18N_KEY LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18nKey},'%')) ESCAPE '\'
AND LANGU_CODE = #{languCode}
AND
I18N_VALUE LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_value},'%')) ESCAPE '\'
GROUP BY SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE.I18N_KEY

SELECT COUNT(I18N_KEY) FROM ( SELECT I18N_KEY FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE . VALID = '1' AND I18N_KEY LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_key},'%')) ESCAPE '\' GROUP BY SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE .I18N_KEY ) T

SELECT I18N_KEY FROM( SELECT rownum seq,I18N_KEY FROM( SELECT I18N_KEY FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE . VALID = '1' AND I18N_KEY LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_key},'%')) ESCAPE '\' GROUP BY I18N_KEY ) )t1
WHERE t1.seq >= #{rowStart} AND t1.seq <= #{rowOver}

SELECT COUNT(I18N_VALUE) FROM ( SELECT I18N_VALUE FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE . VALID = '1' AND LANGU_CODE = #{langu_code} AND I18N_VALUE LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_value},'%')) ESCAPE '\' ) T

SELECT I18N_VALUE FROM( SELECT rownum seq, I18N_VALUE FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE.VALID = '1' AND LANGU_CODE = #{langu_code} AND I18N_VALUE LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT(#{i18n_value},'%')) ESCAPE '\' )t1
WHERE t1.seq >= #{rowStart} AND t1.seq <= #{rowOver}

SELECT ID , I18N_KEY , LANGU_CODE , I18N_VALUE FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE 1=1
AND I18N_KEY = #{i18nKey} AND VALID = '1'

SELECT ID , I18N_KEY , I18N_VALUE , LANGU_CODE , MODULE_CODE , MODULE_VERSION_CODE , VALID , CREATOR , MODIFIER , CREATE_TIME , MODIFY_TIME FROM SUPFUSION_I18N_RESOURCE WHERE 1=1
AND I18N_KEY = #{key} AND VALID = '1'
